nasb.text: How great is Your goodness, Which You have stored up for those who fear You, Which You have wrought for those who take refuge in You, Before the sons of men!

esv.text: Oh, how abundant is your goodness, which you have stored up for those who fear you and worked for those who take refuge in you, in the sight of the children of mankind!

cnv.text: 耶和華啊！你為敬畏你的人所珍藏的好處， 為投靠你的人在世人面前所施行的恩惠， 是多麼豐盛。

ccb.text: 你的恩惠何其大——为敬畏你的人而预备， 在世人面前赐给投靠你的人。

csbs.text: 在世人面前，你为敬畏你的人所留存的美善， 为投靠你的人所行的美善， 是何等丰富！
